reconstruction_note: This state file was reconstructed on 2026-05-24 to make ayyuhal-walad trackable by the post-2026-05-23 orchestrator. Ayyuhal-walad was authored before the orchestrator existed (5 chapters + 5 contracts + 5 episodes + 3 transcripts + 1 audit, all already in content/drafts/ayyuhal-walad/). No phase timestamps are fabricated — only `last_completed_phase: per-chapter` is asserted from the artifacts on disk. See meta.yml for the original pre-orchestrator provenance. Mode label `pre_orchestrator_authored` is distinct from `non_orchestrated_mode_2` (the latter denotes a deliberate bypass; this denotes pre-existence).

scaffold.note: Manually scaffolded pre-orchestrator; see meta.yml provenance.

0f.note: Series plan present; episode list locked at 5.

per-chapter.completion_note: 3 episodes authored (WC8 holistic structure, adopted 2026-05-31). 5-episode original archived under _archive/5-episode-original/.

merge.note: Pre-orchestrator authoring committed directly to develop; no book branch existed.

cost.note: Pre-orchestrator authoring did not capture per-call cost. See _system/cost-ledger.jsonl if present.

convergence_provenance: Challenger convergence ran via the podcast-challenger agent on 2026-05-31 over the canonical WC8 3-episode set; verdict SHIP-WITH-CAUTION, health 0.92, P0=0 (see _system/challenger-report.md). pipeline_mode stamped orchestrated to reflect that a real convergence loop ran (the field is operator-managed; no pipeline code writes it).
